parameters.query:
SELECT 
  TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at), 'YYYY-MM') AS month,
  COUNT(*) AS total_listings,
  COUNT(DISTINCT province) AS provinces,
  COUNT(DISTINCT source) AS sources,
  ROUND(AVG(price)::numeric, 0) AS avg_price,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY price)::numeric, 0) AS median_price,
  MIN(price) AS min_price,
  MAX(price) AS max_price,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN property_type = 'house' THEN 1 END) AS houses,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN property_type = 'apartment' THEN 1 END) AS apartments,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN property_type = 'townhouse' THEN 1 END) AS townhouses,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN property_type = 'plot' THEN 1 END) AS plots
FROM properties
WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '13 months'
AND price > 0
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at)
ORDER BY month DESC
LIMIT 13;

SELECT 
  province,
  COUNT(*) AS total_listings,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN created_at >= DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW()) - INTERVAL '1 month' 
        AND created_at < DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW()) THEN 1 END) AS last_month,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN created_at >= DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW()) - INTERVAL '2 months'
        AND created_at < DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW()) - INTERVAL '1 month' THEN 1 END) AS prev_month,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN created_at >= DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW()) - INTERVAL '1 month' THEN price END)::numeric, 0) AS last_month_avg_price,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN created_at >= DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW()) - INTERVAL '2 months'
        AND created_at < DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW()) - INTERVAL '1 month' THEN price END)::numeric, 0) AS prev_month_avg_price
FROM properties
WHERE status IN ('active', 'stale')
AND price > 0
AND province IS NOT NULL AND province != ''
GROUP BY province
ORDER BY last_month DESC;

SELECT 
  DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at)::date AS month,
  COUNT(*) AS new_leads,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'converted' THEN 1 END) AS conversions,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'lost' THEN 1 END) AS lost,
  ROUND(
    COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'converted' THEN 1 END)::numeric / 
    NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100, 1
  ) AS conversion_rate
FROM leads
WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '13 months'
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at)
ORDER BY month DESC
LIMIT 13;
